examples.title: Message Queue Producer-Consumer
examples.description: Demonstrates message queue for communication between processes
examples.explanation: Shows message queue creation with ftok(), sending with msgsnd(), receiving with msgrcv(), and cleanup with msgctl() IPC_RMID.

examples.title: Shared Memory Example
examples.description: Demonstrates shared memory segment between parent and child
examples.explanation: Shows shared memory creation with shmget(), attachment with shmat(), data sharing between parent/child, detachment with shmdt(), cleanup with shmctl().

examples.title: Semaphore for Process Synchronization
examples.description: Demonstrates binary semaphore for mutual exclusion
examples.explanation: Shows semaphore creation with semget(), initialization with semctl() SETVAL, P-operation (wait) with semop(-1), V-operation (signal) with semop(1), cleanup with IPC_RMID.
